script: (function(){ var result = {}; var filterPanel = document.querySelector('div.filter-panel'); if (!filterPanel) return { error: 'no filter panel' }; var pr = filterPanel.getBoundingClientRect(); result.panel = { x: Math.round(pr.x), y: Math.round(pr.y), w: Math.round(pr.width), h: Math.round(pr.height) }; var allItems = filterPanel.querySelectorAll('div.filter-item, [class*="filter-item"], [class*="item"]'); if (allItems.length === 0) { var allDivs = filterPanel.querySelectorAll('div'); allItems = allDivs; } result.items = []; var seen = new Set(); for (var i = 0; i < allItems.length; i++) { var e = allItems[i]; var txt = (e.innerText||'').trim(); if (!txt || txt.length > 20) continue; if (seen.has(txt)) continue; seen.add(txt); var r = e.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width > 20 && r.height > 10 && r.width < 200) { result.items.push({ text: txt, className: (e.className||'').toString().substring(0,80), x: Math.round(r.x + r.width/2), y: Math.round(r.y + r.height/2), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }); } } var buttons = filterPanel.querySelectorAll('button, [class*="btn"], [class*="button"], [role="button"]'); result.buttons = Array.from(buttons).map(function(e){ var r = e.getBoundingClientRect(); return { text: (e.innerText||'').trim(), className: (e.className||'').toString().substring(0,80), x: Math.round(r.x + r.width/2), y: Math.round(r.y + r.height/2), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }; }).filter(function(b){ return b.text && b.w > 20; }); return result; })()
